raw_title: Anthropic makes last-ditch effort to salvage deal with Pentagon after blowup
raw_content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is reportedly back at the negotiating table with the Department of Defense in an attempt to salvage the company's relationship with the US military and prevent it from being iced out of defense work for being a "supply chain risk." Talks between the two parties imploded on Friday after weeks of […]
